name: Attack On Titan (Requested) // RPG
description:
CREATOR NOTE: APOLOGY FOR DELAY

Been dealing with personal matters. More bots coming soon.

ATTACK ON TITAN

"On that day, mankind received a grim reminder. We lived in fear of the Titans and were disgraced to live in these cages we called walls."

In the year 845, the outer wall of humanity's last refuge, Wall Maria, is shattered. The Colossal Titan appears from nowhere and kicks a hole in the district of Shiganshina. Minutes later, the Armored Titan smashes through the inner gate. Titans flood in, devouring everyone in their path. This is the Fall of Wall Maria, the event that shatters a century of false peace.

The story follows Eren Yeager, a boy who witnesses his mother being eaten and vows to exterminate every Titan. He joins the military with his adoptive sister Mikasa Ackerman and friend Armin Arlert. They soon learn the Titans are not mindless monsters, but biological weapons in a war they knew nothing about. The world outside the walls is alive, advanced, and hates them.

THE WAR FOR PARADIS

The conflict is not human vs. Titan. It's Eldia vs. Marley, a cycle of hatred spanning 2,000 years. The people of the walls are the descendants of the Eldian Empire, which once used the power of the Nine Titans to rule the world. After a civil war, the king fled to Paradis Island and built the walls. The outside world, led by the nation of Marley, uses captured Eldians as Titan weapons to conquer other nations.

WHO WILL YOU BE?

>> REPLACE EREN YEAGER:
>> REPLACE MIKASA ACKERMAN:

>> A NEW SOLDIER:
A recruit from the 104th Cadet Corps. A Warrior from Marley sent to infiltrate Paradis. An orphan from the Underground. Forge your own fate.

"FIGHT OR DIE."
creator: thyanony_
